findings.title: Manifest does not pin execution binaries
findings.details: The provided manifests enumerate output artifacts and selected build metadata, but do not define the exact MNDe engine binaries and SHA-256 values required for a compliant black-box audit.

findings.title: Published audit path rebuilds or transpiles during execution
findings.details: The shipped harness invokes node --experimental-strip-types for TypeScript and cargo run --quiet --release for Rust. That violates the requested ban on recompilation, rebuild, and transpilation during audit execution.

findings.title: No independently verifiable auditor signature path
findings.details: Shipped receipts and signatures use HMAC-SHA256 with key id ecs-hmac-key-v1. No auditor public key, detached artifact signatures, or independent verification material was shipped.

findings.title: No git provenance available in shipped workspace
findings.details: The workspace is not a git checkout and no .git directory was found. The required commit-hash verification step cannot be completed.

findings.title: Published performance evidence does not satisfy the requested sustained-window proof
findings.details: Published profiles include throughput values of 3890.2014, 3796.593696, 3412.792237, and 9734.084285 req/s, and no shipped artifact demonstrates every 10-second window at or above 10,000 req/s for a 300-second run.

findings.title: Second-machine parity and live external deployment proof were not reproducible from the drop
findings.details: The supplied package references parity and proof bundles, but the requested independent second-machine execution, network disconnect choreography, and live external traffic observer workflow are not executable from this single local workspace.
